TimestampAI

Terms of Service

Last updated: March 16, 2025

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of TimestampAI (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

1. Description of Service

TimestampAI is an AI-powered tool that generates chapter timestamps for videos. You may submit YouTube URLs or upload video files, and our system will return AI-generated timestamped chapter markers.

2. Account Registration

To use the Service beyond free credits, you must create an account by providing your name and email address. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account.

3. Credits and Payments

  • The Service operates on a credit-based system. Each timestamp generation consumes 1 credit.
  • Credits are purchased in packs (Starter: 10 credits, Pro: 50 credits, Business: 200 credits).
  • Payments are processed by Lemon Squeezy (card) or Cryptomus (cryptocurrency). By making a purchase you agree to their respective terms of service.
  • Credits are non-transferable and cannot be exchanged for cash.
  • Credits do not expire as long as your account remains active.
  • All sales are final. We do not offer refunds once credits have been added to an account, except where required by applicable law.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Submit content that violates any law or third-party rights
  • Submit copyrighted material you do not have the right to process
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, scrape, or abuse the Service
  • Use the Service to generate content for spam or automated systems at scale
  • Impersonate another person or entity

5. Intellectual Property

The timestamps generated by the Service are provided for your personal or commercial use. The TimestampAI brand, interface, and underlying code remain our intellectual property. You retain ownership of any video content you submit.

6. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that results will be accurate. AI-generated timestamps may require manual review.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, TimestampAI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service, including but not limited to loss of data or revenue.

8. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our discretion if you violate these Terms. You may stop using the Service at any time. Termination does not entitle you to a refund of unused credits.

9. Changes to Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

10. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by applicable law. Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration or, where not permitted, in the courts of the applicable jurisdiction.

11. Contact

Questions about these Terms? Contact us.

© 2025 TimestampAI · Privacy Policy · Contact
